member.name: T:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext
member.summary: Source-generated JsonSerializerContext for AOT trimming/performance and consistent camelCase handling. Mirrors the pattern used in ProjectFulcrum Contracts/Messages. All hand-coded ToJson/FromJson methods in this library prefer this context.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.Boolean
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.NullableBoolean
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.ByteArray
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.Double
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.NullableDouble
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.ClaimPath
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.DigitalIdCredential
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.DigitalIdErrorCode
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.DigitalIdException
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.DigitalIdRequestOptions
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.DictionaryStringObject
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.IReadOnlyListClaimPath
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.IReadOnlyListString
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.DateTimeOffset
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.NullableDateTimeOffset
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.Int32
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.NullableInt32
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.Object
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.String
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.Default
member.summary: The default associated with a default instance.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.GeneratedSerializerOptions
member.summary: The source-generated options associated with this context.

member.name: T:DigitalId.ClaimPath
member.summary: Represents a path to a specific claim inside a digital credential (mdoc style). Matches the Dart ClaimPath shape exactly for interoperability.

member.name: M:DigitalId.ClaimPath.ToJson
member.summary: Hand-coded serialization (no reflection-heavy generators at runtime). Produces camelCase JSON matching the Flutter/Dart side exactly.

member.name: M:DigitalId.ClaimPath.ToMap
member.summary: Map form using the same camelCase keys as Dart toMap().

member.name: T:DigitalId.DigitalIdCredential
member.summary: The result of a successful digital identity presentation. Contains both structured fields (for immediate frontend use) and the raw cryptographic proof (for backend validation). Hand-coded serialization + attributes produce exact camelCase + base64/ISO shape matching Flutter/Dart.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdCredential.AllDisclosedClaims
member.summary: Raw map of every claim that was actually disclosed.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdCredential.RawCredential
member.summary: The full verifiable presentation / encrypted blob / mdoc device response. This is what must be sent to your backend for validation.

member.name: M:DigitalId.DigitalIdCredential.ToJson
member.summary: Hand-coded serialization (no source generators at runtime). Produces exact camelCase + base64/ISO matching the Dart toJson()/toMap().

member.name: M:DigitalId.DigitalIdCredential.ToMap
member.summary: Produces a map with exact camelCase keys and base64/ISO values matching Dart toMap().

member.name: M:DigitalId.DigitalIdException.ToJson
member.summary: Hand-coded JSON matching Dart DigitalIdException.toJson() shape.

member.name: T:DigitalId.DigitalIdErrorCode
member.summary: Error codes matching the Dart DigitalIdErrorCode enum.

member.name: T:DigitalId.DigitalIdRequestOptions
member.summary: Controls what data is requested from a digital identity document (selective disclosure). Matches Dart DigitalIdRequestOptions exactly for cross-platform use.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdRequestOptions.PlatformOptions
member.summary: Platform-specific escape hatch (advanced use only).

member.name: M:DigitalId.DigitalIdRequestOptions.ToJson
member.summary: Hand-coded serialization producing camelCase JSON matching Flutter toJson().

member.name: M:DigitalId.DigitalIdRequestOptions.ToMap
member.summary: Map using exact camelCase keys from Dart toMap().

member.name: T:DigitalId.DigitalIdType
member.summary: The type of government-issued digital identity document.

member.name: F:DigitalId.DigitalIdType.Passport
member.summary: Passport or passport-derived Digital ID.

member.name: F:DigitalId.DigitalIdType.EuDigitalId
member.summary: EU Digital Identity / eIDAS PID or national eID.

member.name: F:DigitalId.DigitalIdType.DriversLicense
member.summary: Driver's license or mobile Driver's License (mDL).

member.name: F:DigitalId.DigitalIdType.AgeVerificationOnly
member.summary: Special mode for age verification only (minimal disclosure).

member.name: T:DigitalId.Requests.DigitalIdRequestBuilder
member.summary: Builds OpenID4VP / DCQL requests from the cross-platform options.

member.name: T:DigitalId.Verification.Apple.AppleResponseDecryptor
member.summary: Decrypts Apple "encrypted" identity responses returned by PassKit Verify with Wallet.

member.name: T:DigitalId.Verification.DigitalIdVerifier
member.summary: Production-capable verification for mdoc and digital credentials. Real COSE validation is now performed when proper keys are provided.

member.name: T:DigitalId.Verification.Mdoc.MdocParser
member.summary: Basic parser for mdoc DeviceResponse. This is a pragmatic implementation focused on extracting the structures needed for verification.

member.name: T:DigitalId.Verification.Mdoc.MdocVerifier
member.summary: Production-oriented mdoc verifier. This class actually performs cryptographic validation of mdoc presentations.

member.name: M:DigitalId.Verification.Mdoc.MdocVerifier.Verify(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.Byte[],Org.BouncyCastle.Crypto.AsymmetricKeyParameter,Org.BouncyCastle.Crypto.AsymmetricKeyParameter)
member.summary: Verifies a complete mdoc DeviceResponse.
